creator: glen.j.barber@gmail.com
text:
--- apache13    2009-02-10 11:25:32.000000000 -0500
+++ apache13_edit       2009-02-10 11:27:04.000000000 -0500
@@ -3,6 +3,9 @@
       absolute URL target location per RFC 2068. Uses of RedirectMatch that
       specify a relative URL will fail and must be corrected to function.
 
+===>  For apache to start properly, you must have your server's hostname
+       in /etc/hosts.
+
 ===>  BE CAREFULL HOW TO BOOT on 1.3.29_4 or after:
        To run apache www server from startup, add apache_enable="YES"
        in your /etc/rc.conf.

Fix: 

See above.
